name: Hill's Bus Svc Inc

recent_news: No public web presence; no news or M&A activity located

name: Two Star Bussing
districts_or_customers: Likely contractor or sub-contractor for Crivitz School District (Marinette County, WI) - unconfirmed
recent_news: No public news or M&A activity; no website; appears to be a husband-and-wife micro-contractor
fit_notes: Single-route family micro-operator in rural northern WI; too small to be a stand-alone Summit tuck-in but could be acquired as fold-in if Summit builds Wisconsin density.

name: Warco Inc
principals: Millard family (Joan Millard - driver; family-run); specific owner not confirmed
districts_or_customers: Approximately 6 area school districts in southwestern Wisconsin (Grant County region around Bloomington); also operates motorcoach charters and tours
recent_news: No M&A activity located; long-running family business (60+ years) operating as Warco Transportation Inc; member of United Motorcoach Association; USDOT 181362
fit_notes: Legitimate 60+ year family-owned school bus + motorcoach operator serving ~6 SW WI districts; classic Summit tuck-in profile (multi-generational, succession risk, mixed school/charter book) - worth direct outreach to Millard family principals.

name: Wheelers Handicap Vans
districts_or_customers: Not a school/SPED transportation contractor; address (8000 Jacksboro Hwy) is in a Fort Worth auto/dealer corridor; appears to be a handicap van rental/sales operation rather than a transportation service provider
recent_news: No news located; not appearing in TX special-needs student transport listings
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target - likely a wheelchair van rental/sales dealer (similar to MobilityWorks / Wheelers AVR brand) rather than a contracted student-transport or SPED operator. Recommend drop.

name: J L Wheelchair Transportation
districts_or_customers: Non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) for wheelchair-bound clients in LA San Fernando Valley area; no evidence of school district or SPED contracts
recent_news: No news; only Facebook presence; appears to be micro NEMT operation
fit_notes: Pure NEMT micro-operator, not school/SPED student-transport contractor. Outside Summit's core school-bus M&A thesis - recommend drop.
